scoring_notes: Per VIRAL_GUARDRAILS.md §10, the meme/trend-jack format minimum is 75. Audio strategy (Cat 4) is N/A for static image memes; scored as 8/10 default for the audio-less path (no robotic TTS, no off-beat cuts possible). Retention structure (Cat 2) adapted for static images: scored on whether the image holds the eye long enough to read (text legibility + composition). All 10 samples pass the manifesto and the voice/compliance gates above.

hook.notes: Recognizable Drake template instantly readable; top text 'clean offer in their budget' sets up scroll-stop in 1s

retention.notes: Two-panel structure pays off in second panel; eye travel rewarded

text.notes: Impact white-on-black-stroke, fitted to slot, legible at grid preview

engagement.notes: Send to any agent friend who has been there. Caption 'If you know.' invites self-recognition

cover.notes: Single image is the cover; high-contrast Drake template

cta.notes: Soft caption-based CTA, no in-frame CTA. Punchline lands in bottom panel

voice_brand.notes: Canonical white stacked Ryan Realty logo bottom-right; meme-genre Impact font is the documented exception (Matt directive + meme convention)

antislop.notes: Banned-words clean; no semicolons or em-dashes; no exclamation; no AI humor (Matt-written punchline); no data claims

hook.notes: Distracted Boyfriend template is instantly recognizable; specific dollar anchors ($400K, $650K)

retention.notes: Three-figure scan rewards a second pass

text.notes: White label boxes with bold black text over each figure

hook.notes: Recognizable This Is Fine comic; top caption '4:55pm on closing day' is concrete

text.notes: Impact in canvas-relative letterbox bands above and below comic

engagement.notes: Closing day chaos = high agent-share rate; consumer recognition too

hook.notes: 4-panel expanding brain rewards top-to-bottom read; final panel is the payoff

retention.notes: Escalation structure is the format's defining retention pattern

text.notes: Arial Bold black on white panels, left-aligned next to brain images

engagement.notes: Universal buyer escalation, screen-shottable for buyer's-agent group chats
Zestimate deflation is a universal listing-agent share

hook.notes: Recognizable but the take needs to land in the upper sign area; tested legible

text.notes: Black bold on white sign, legible. Slightly tight at small sizes

engagement.notes: Change My Mind format is engineered for comment provocation

cta.notes: Implicit comment CTA — the format invites disagreement

hook.notes: Top caption 'Refusing to name a number first' sets up the unlikely-allies payoff

engagement.notes: Both sides recognize themselves; high cross-audience share

hook.notes: 4-panel plan-realization rewards full read; payoff in panel 3 (and again in panel 4 with Gru's reaction)

retention.notes: Plan-then-realize structure is the format's defining retention pattern

text.notes: White paste-on cards at top of each panel; Arial Bold black text

engagement.notes: HGTV-to-reality pipeline — couples send to each other

antislop.notes: Original draft had 'toddler' (familial-status touch); rewritten to '50 hours a week and never used a saw' before render

hook.notes: Two Buttons template recognizable; agent-leaning audience

text.notes: Button labels in white plates above red buttons; bottom caption identifies the protagonist

engagement.notes: Listing agent send-to-peer pattern; smaller share volume than dual-audience templates

hook.notes: Front astronaut realization is concrete; 'inspection finds SOMETHING wrong with EVERY house' lands fast

retention.notes: Two-beat speech structure is the format's defining retention pattern

engagement.notes: Universal homebuyer truth; high cross-audience share

batch_summary.verdict: all 10 ship — every sample clears the meme format minimum (75) by at least 10 points; no auto-zero failures
